title: Instruction Fine-tuning Pipelines
description: Architect instruction fine-tuning pipelines using high-quality synthetic datasets (Evol-Instruct). Design Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) strategies to align models with specific behavioral traits.
objectives: Architect instruction fine-tuning pipelines using high-quality synthetic datasets (Evol-Instruct).
Design Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) strategies to align models with specific behavioral traits.
